context: Tests whether the agent implements a tolerant-reader receiver that reads schema_version first, drops below MIN/above MAX with documented log events, prompts update on too-new, routes to per-version handlers, and documents the migration flow.

checklist.name: HANDLERS object
checklist.description: HANDLERS object is exposed with keys 1 and 2 mapped to stub functions

checklist.name: process handles missing version
checklist.description: When envelope.schema_version is not a number, process calls logger.warn with event name 'schema.version.missing' and returns without throwing

checklist.name: process handles too-old
checklist.description: When schema_version < MIN_SUPPORTED, process calls logger.warn with event name 'schema.version.too_old' (NOT calls a handler) and returns

checklist.name: process handles too-new
checklist.description: When schema_version > MAX_SUPPORTED, process calls logger.warn with event name 'schema.version.too_new' AND calls promptUserToUpdate() and returns

checklist.name: Routes via HANDLERS lookup
checklist.description: For supported versions, process calls HANDLERS[envelope.schema_version](envelope.payload) — passing the payload, not the whole envelope

checklist.name: Never throws on unknown fields
checklist.description: The process function (and the documented HANDLERS contract) does not depend on knowing every field — it only reads schema_version and passes payload through; no destructuring that would throw on missing optional fields

checklist.name: applyMigrationStep T0
checklist.description: applyMigrationStep('T0') returns the documented string 'Producer + receiver both at v1.'

checklist.name: applyMigrationStep T1
checklist.description: applyMigrationStep('T1') returns 'Receiver updated to handle BOTH v1 and v2.'

checklist.name: applyMigrationStep T2
checklist.description: applyMigrationStep('T2') returns 'Producer updated to write v2.'

checklist.name: applyMigrationStep T3
checklist.description: applyMigrationStep('T3') returns 'After confidence period, drop v1 handler in receivers.'

checklist.name: applyMigrationStep unknown
checklist.description: applyMigrationStep('something-else') returns 'Unknown step. Valid steps: T0, T1, T2, T3.'

checklist.name: Comment on immutable schema version
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states schema_version is a monotonic integer and that v1 is forever v1 (never reuse a number for a different shape)

checklist.name: Comment on tolerant-reader contract
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states the receiver is a tolerant reader (unknown fields ignored, never crashed on)

checklist.name: Comment on migration order
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states the migration order T0 → T1 → T2 → T3 and that T0 → T2 directly is wrong
